name: tempfile临时文件
expected: 应该创建临时文件并输出 ok
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/tempfile_test.py << "PYEOF"
import tempfile
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode="w", delete=False) as f:
    f.write("test")
print("ok")
PYEOF'

name: csv文件读写
expected: 应该写入 CSV 并读取第一列值 a
commands:
/nsjail bash -c 'cat > /workspace/csv_test.py << "PYEOF"
import csv
with open("/workspace/t.csv", "w", newline="") as f:
    csv.writer(f).writerow(["a", "b"])
with open("/workspace/t.csv") as f:
    print(list(csv.reader(f))[0][0])
PYEOF'

name: 创建venv并安装包
expected: 应该创建虚拟环境、安装 requests 包并输出版本号

name: venv中运行脚本
expected: 应该在虚拟环境中运行脚本并输出 hello from venv
